examples: The Confectionery Warehouse is a chocoholic's dream.
Palm oil is an ingredient in an estimated third of all products on supermarket shelves, from biscuits and margarine to shampoo and confectionery.
Danone once dabbled in glass, ready meals, beer and confectionery.
Once the confectionery paths are dissolved, they leave a network of artery-like channels in their void.
Topps stays afloat on its slowly growing confectionery business--Bazooka Bubble Gum and Ring Pops.
